result.summary: Found 2 issues: major text truncation in game tiles affecting usability, and minor header navigation text cutoff.

issues.description: Game tile titles are being truncated and cut off in both the 'BetRivers Exclusive Games' and 'Top Played New Games' sections. Examples include 'MAGNI...' (should be full game name), 'Hyperc...' (partially visible), and 'Dark...' (partially visible). This prevents users from reading complete game names.
issues.suggestion: Ensure game tile containers have proper text overflow handling. Either expand tile height to fit multi-line text, implement text wrapping, or use CSS ellipsis with full title in a tooltip on hover.

issues.description: The 'Hot Game' navigation item in the top menu bar is truncated and displays as 'Hot Gam'.
issues.suggestion: Adjust the navigation item width or reduce padding/font size to accommodate the full text, or implement text wrapping for menu items on smaller viewports.
